And based on what other people are saying, I don't care if the Monstars or Micheal Jordan make an appearance in this movie because, in my opinion, I don't think they're what made Space Jam what it is, for both films. All that Space Jam is, is of Looney Tunes playing basketball with the best known athlete on their side against a team of super bad guys who not only have special powers, but are reflections of other well-known basketball players. It doesn't matter if one person or a team of people from a previous installment make a cameo in the next film. That's not important. What's important is that you have fun watching the Tune Squad play against the villains to save their necks and the real players' life and just enjoy all the new stuff coming so as not to get too hung up on nostalgia. I know I will enjoy this film when I see it in theaters, no matter what. And perhaps, I might see it on day one since I'm hyped to see this film over the rest of the movies of 2021.
